title: Project Little Boy Aegis Layer 1 Agent Finding
description: Strict Layer 1 perception output. LLM agents act only as binary detectors and ATT&CK/CAPEC mappers. Layer 2 performs all deterministic scoring and routing.

threat_detected.description: True only when the agent flags a threat or abnormal security-relevant event from the supplied telemetry.

capec_id.description: Best CAPEC mapping such as CAPEC-1. Use an empty string when no CAPEC mapping is available.

mitre_attack_id.description: Best MITRE ATT&CK technique or sub-technique such as T1021.002. Use an empty string when no ATT&CK mapping is available.

raw_evidence.description: Short masked evidence excerpt or factual observation supporting the binary finding and mapping.
